Home / Internal Tools & Admin Panels / Teable

Teable — open source alternative

Postgres-backed Airtable alternative.

Strengths

  • Built on Postgres — real database power.
  • Real-time collaboration and Airtable-style views.
  • Active development with frequent releases.

Weaknesses

  • Newer than NocoDB / Baserow.
  • Advanced features still shipping.
  • Smaller extension library.
License: AGPL-3.0 Self-host difficulty: 2/5 Hosted cloud option

Official site · Source on GitHub

Ad slot — OSS middle

Teable is used as an alternative to

Airtable

Spreadsheet-database hybrid with rich field types and views.

See all alternatives →
